payload.author: claude
payload.body:
AGENT BRIEFING (read before investigating).

FULL CONTEXT: read epic SCP-120 and validation spike SCP-121 first. We want a CHEAP phase-1 single-tenant deploy (existing Express hub on the public internet with real login) before multi-tenancy.

WHERE TO LOOK:
- src/server.js (Express hub — what gets deployed), src/hub.js (watchdog/Bonjour -> becomes LB/failover)
- package.json (runtime + native deps like better-sqlite3 — native deps constrain platforms/serverless)
- .github/ release tooling (tag-driven GitHub Actions release, see SCP-26)
- TREBUCHET is in this project's toolbelt: read the trebuchet skill docs (cloud-deployment, aws-lambda, observability, streaming) and assess it honestly as a runtime for the realtime/streaming layer. Long-lived SSE/WS connections constrain serverless choices — weigh that.

STILL OPEN (your job): runtime/platform (containerized Express on Fly.io/Render/ECS vs serverless/Trebuchet); public TLS + custom domains + CORS (replacing self-signed local CA + scope.local); CI/CD (piggyback tag-driven Actions vs separate pipeline); observability; backup/restore + DR for the canonical event log; the MINIMAL phase-1 stack. Coordinate w/ SCP-125 (long-lived conns) and SCP-124 (storage).

DELIVERABLE: comment a recommended phase-1 stack + sketch of eventual production topology, then spawn implementation child stories with parent=SCP-120.
